mapper.select:
select TBCE.*,tbt.STATUS TRUST_STATUS from T_BUS_CUSTOMER_ENTRUST TBCE left join t_bus_trust tbt on TBCE.trust_id = tbt.id
TBCE.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select tbt.id id, TBCE.id entrust_id, TBCE.entrust_no, TBCE.trust_no, TBCE.company_id, TBCE.company_name, TBCE.customer_id, TBCE.customer_name, TBCE.trade_type, TBCE.imp_exp, TBCE.start_time, TBCE.end_time, TBCE.plan_quantity, TBCE.plan_ton, TBCE.remark, TBCE.status entrust_status, TBCE.create_by, TBCE.create_by_name, TBCE.create_time, TBCE.update_by, TBCE.update_by_name, TBCE.update_time, TBCE.cargo_owner_name, TBCE.cargo_name, TBCE.shipvoyage_item_id, TBCE.work_accompanying_id, TBCE.type, TBCE.trust_id, TBCE.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE , TBCE.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, tbt.STATUS, tbt.IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK, tbt.POUND_REMARK, tbt.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, tbt.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, tbt.EST_AMOUNT from T_BUS_CUSTOMER_ENTRUST TBCE left join t_bus_trust tbt on TBCE.trust_id = tbt.id
TBCE.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBED.id, TBED.entrust_id, TBED.cargo_info_id, TBED.trust_id, TBED.shipvoyage_id, TBED.shipvoyage_item_id, TBED.scn, TBED.ship_name, TBED.cargo_owner_id, TBED.cargo_owner_name, TBED.cargo_code, TBED.cargo_name, TBED.trade_type, TBED.packing_code, TBED.packing_name, TBED.company_id, TBED.company_name, TBED.quantity, TBED.ton, TBED.voyage, TBED.delivery_numbers, TBED.delivery_id, TBED.trust_cargo_id, tbci.cargo_info_no, TBTC.IS_STOP_OPERATION_TIME, TBTC.IS_STOP_OPERATION_NAME, TBTC.PRINT_POUND_ID, TBTC.PRINT_POUND_NUM, TBTC.IS_SECOND_WEIGH, TBTC.EST_AMOUNT, TBTC.CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TBTC.CONTRACT_ID, TBTC.BUSINESS_NO from T_BUS_ENTRUST_DETAIL TBED left join T_BUS_CUSTOMER_ENTRUST TBCE on TBED.ENTRUST_ID = TBCE.ID left join t_bus_cargo_info tbci on tbed.cargo_info_id = tbci.id left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on (TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBED.CARGO_INFO_ID and TBCE.TRUST_ID = TBTC.TRUST_ID)
TBED.ENTRUST_ID = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBED.trust_cargo_id id, TBED.id entrust_detail_id, TBED.entrust_id, TBED.cargo_info_id, TBED.trust_id, TBED.shipvoyage_id, TBED.shipvoyage_item_id, TBED.scn, TBED.ship_name, TBED.cargo_owner_id, TBED.cargo_owner_name, TBED.cargo_code, TBED.cargo_name, TBED.trade_type, TBED.packing_code, TBED.packing_name, TBED.company_id, TBED.company_name, TBED.quantity, TBED.ton, TBED.create_by, TBED.create_by_name, TBED.create_time, TBED.update_by, TBED.update_by_name, TBED.update_time, TBED.voyage, TBED.delivery_numbers, TBED.delivery_id, tbci.cargo_info_no, TBTC.IS_STOP_OPERATION_TIME, TBTC.IS_STOP_OPERATION_NAME, TBTC.PRINT_POUND_ID, TBTC.PRINT_POUND_NUM, TBTC.IS_SECOND_WEIGH, TBTC.EST_AMOUNT, TBTC.CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TBTC.CONTRACT_ID, TBCR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME||':'|| TBCR.RATE RATE_LABEL, TBC.CONTACT_NO CONTRACT_NAME, TBTC.BUSINESS_NO from T_BUS_ENTRUST_DETAIL TBED left join t_bus_cargo_info tbci on TBED.cargo_info_id = tbci.id left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBTC.id = TBED.trust_cargo_id left join T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC on TBC.id = TBTC.CONTRACT_ID left join T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR on TBCR.id = CONTRACT_RATE_ID
TBED.ENTRUST_ID = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_BUS_CUSTOMER_ENTRUST ( ID, ENTRUST_NO, TRUST_NO, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, IMP_EXP, START_TIME, END_TIME, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, REMARK,
STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME,
CARGO_OWNER_NAME,
CARGO_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TYPE, POUND_REMARK, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK,SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE ,SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entrustNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType}, #{impExp}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{planQuantity}, #{planTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now},
#{cargoOwnerName}, #{cargoName}, #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, '集港', #{poundRemark}, #{isWeiqiaoPoundRemark},#{settlementBasisCode},#{settlementBasisName} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_CUSTOMER_ENTRUST SET COMPANY_ID = #{companyId}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType}, IMP_EXP = #{impExp}, START_TIME = #{startTime}, END_TIME = #{endTime}, PLAN_QUANTITY = #{planQuantity}, PLAN_TON = #{planQuantity}, REMARK = #{remark},
STATUS = #{status},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now},
CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName}, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId}, POUND_REMARK = #{poundRemark}, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK = #{isWeiqiaoPoundRemark}, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE =#{settlementBasisCode} , SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME = #{settlementBasisName} where id = #{id}
